note: Created AotSourceGeneratorTests.cs with 2 tests: (1) Build_WithPublishAot_ProducesNoWarnings - builds with PublishAot=true -warnaserror, asserts exit code 0 and no SYSLIB1054/1051 in output. (2) Build_WithPublishAot_GeneratesMarshallingCode - builds with EmitCompilerGeneratedFiles=true, verifies generated marshalling .cs files exist under obj/**/generated/ and reference NativeMethods. All 51 tests pass.
